title: Last Lumen Knight
description:
In a world where the balance between Light and Darkness has shattered, awaken as the last knight of a ruined order and begin a recurring journey of resurrection.

'Last Lumen Knight' is a 2D action-platformer roguelike that blends precise platforming with unique probability mechanics. 
Explore randomly shifting battlefields, defy the darkness that plunged the world into corruption, and uncover the ultimate truth.

Direct Controls & Mouse-Driven CombatWith movement mapped to the keyboard and combat assigned to the mouse, experience intuitive and seamless action. 
 Chain basic attacks, ranged strikes, and three distinctive skills to completely dominate the battlefield.

High-Stakes 'Damage Roulette' & UltimateScroll your mouse wheel before unleashing a skill to trigger the 'Damage Roulette'—the core mechanic of Last Lumen Knight. 
From a 0% penalty to a massive +100% maximum boost, the outcome instantly dictates your final damage. 
Combine the roulette with a devastating Ultimate to create strategic variables that break the monotony of combat.

Flip Your Fate: The 'Coin Flip' Relic SystemThe Relics of the Order you collect while exploring stages are central to your growth. 
Every time you acquire a Relic, a 'Coin Flip' is initiated. 
Landing on heads empowers the relic's effect or grants bonus stats. 
Enjoy a risk-free probability system and discover entirely new build synergies with every run.

High-Difficulty Multi-Boss BattlesFormidable bosses await at the end of each stage. 
Overcome the ever-increasing complexity and intense pressure of combat as the stages progress, defeat the Darkness Guardians, and step closer to the truth of this broken world.
description_short: 'Last Lumen Knight' is a 2D action-platformer roguelike that blends precise platforming with unique probability mechanics. Explore randomly shifting battlefields, defy the darkness that plunged the world into corruption, and uncover the ultimate truth.
